subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory beseem the dwellers in the depths of oneness who have passed beyond the gulf of names and set their course toward the sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا اهل لجه احدیه را لایق و سزاست که از خلیج اسماء گذشته اند و قصد بحر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @goodly deeds; actions, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @thankfulness; gratitude
